name: wetzler
description: Revise Markdown in James's voice with a Vale-backed MCP server.
long_description: Writing Voice packages James Baker's voice profile, Vale rules, and MCP tools for linting Markdown, preparing host-agent revision packets, and creating review-gated voice update proposals. Applying proposals is intentionally handled by the local CLI.

tools.name: lint_markdown
tools.description: Run the pinned Vale voice rules against Markdown.

tools.name: prepare_revision
tools.description: Prepare a voice contract and Vale findings for host-agent Markdown revision.

tools.name: propose_voice_update
tools.description: Create a review-gated voice update proposal from samples.

tools.name: validate_voice_update
tools.description: Validate a review-gated voice update proposal without applying it.
